title: Interview protocol for the elicitation of community preferences
author: Langhans, Simone Daniela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the standardized protocol based on the Swing method that was used to elicit weight preferences for first-level and second-level management objectives with the overall goal of developing a collaborative management plan for Blueskin Bay estuary (Aotearoa New Zealand) together with the local community.
steps_raw: This is the standardized protocol based on the Swing method that was used to elicit weight preferences for first-level and second-level management objectives with the overall goal of developing a collaborative management plan for Blueskin Bay estuary (Aotearoa New Zealand) together with the local community.
keywords: from the mountains to the sea
